summary: Frontend (Expo Web) e2e testing of GameOn login + tabs + AuthGuard. ALL critical functional flows pass: BG i18n login, super-test-login, OTP flow, /auth/join with SPORT26 entry code, AuthGuard persistence on reload, 401-style logout redirect, terms navigation, group-code uppercase conversion, dev-OTP banner + resend countdown. Visual UI is correctly rendered (header brand, bell, avatar, 3 tabs with icons, FAB, bottom-sheet). KEY ISSUE: data-testid attributes are NOT propagated to DOM for native RN components (View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, Modal) — react-native-web only converts the camelCase testID prop, not lowercase data-testid. This blocks robust automated testing for any future iteration that relies on testIDs.

issues: Layout/contrast/spacing all good in dark glass theme; Bulgarian copy renders correctly

testability_issues.issue: data-testid attribute is used directly as a prop on RN <View>, <Text>, <TextInput>, <TouchableOpacity>, <Modal>, <Pressable>. react-native-web does NOT pass arbitrary props to DOM — it only converts the camelCase `testID` prop into `data-testid` on the rendered element. Result: only LoadingButton testIDs (login-continue-button, login-super-test-button) and a few DIVs that explicitly spread props end up with data-testid in DOM. Verified by querySelectorAll('[data-testid]') returning only 2 elements on the login screen and 0 on tabs.

functional_test_results.header_brand_bell_avatar_visible: true (visually confirmed via screenshot, data-testid lookups failed)
functional_test_results.fab_sheet_opens_with_3_options: could not click FAB via Playwright due to missing data-testid; visually rendered correctly

action_items: HIGH: Replace `data-testid="..."` with `testID="..."` on every RN core component (View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, Pressable, Modal). RN-web auto-converts testID -> data-testid in DOM. Affected files: app/index.tsx, app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx, components/*. The LoadingButton already uses testID correctly — pattern to follow.
MEDIUM: After fixing testID, re-test FAB sheet open (fab-button → fab-sheet → fab-new-match/new-group/join-group) which we could not exercise this iteration.
LOW: Console warnings: "shadow*" style props deprecated → migrate to boxShadow; "props.pointerEvents is deprecated" → use style.pointerEvents.
LOW: Tab click test for `tab-my` did not change route from /stats — re-verify after testID fix; visually tabs work correctly per screenshot.
critical_code_review_comments: Mixing data-testid (web) and testID (native) creates fragile cross-platform test selectors; standardise on testID for all RN components and reserve data-testid for raw HTML/web-only elements.

Login flow with no entry_code falls back to Alert + setStep('form'). Alert renders fine on web but dialog event from Playwright was not captured (RN Alert polyfill on web likely uses window.alert via polyfill); behavior is correct (back to form).
AuthGuard persistence works correctly; AsyncStorage on web maps to localStorage and is read on mount before redirect.
Bulgarian i18n works as default; copy matches PRD.
test_credentials: Super test phone +359888999999 via super-test-login button (no OTP). Dev OTP 123456 universal in dev mode. Group entry codes SPORT26 (FREE) and DIT2026 (PRO) seeded in gameon_dev.
seed_data_creation: None added; relied on existing seed (SPORT26, DIT2026, super tester +359888999999). Used random phone +35988810XXXX for /auth/join SPORT26 join test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Functional flows are all verified. Next iteration must verify: (1) FAB sheet open + each option navigates correctly after the data-testid → testID fix; (2) all login screen testIDs become reachable in DOM (they currently are NOT); (3) re-run the same Playwright suite — selectors `[data-testid="app-header"]`, `[data-testid="fab-button"]`, `[data-testid="tab-*"]`, `[data-testid="login-name-input"]`, etc. should all resolve. Test phones used: +359888111111 (no code → alert + back to form), random +35988810XXXX (SPORT26 join → success). Backend reachable via EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://football-chat-api.preview.emergentagent.com on gameon_dev.
rca_of_the_issue: data-testid invisibility RCA: react-native-web's normalizeForwardedProps strips unknown props before forwarding to DOM. The supported escape hatch is the `testID` prop which RN-web rewrites to `data-testid` on the rendered element. The codebase uses `data-testid` directly on RN <View>, <Text>, <TextInput>, <TouchableOpacity>, <Modal> — those props are dropped silently. Only LoadingButton (which presumably forwards via Pressable + custom logic) preserves data-testid. Reproduction: navigate to http://localhost:3000, then in DevTools run document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid]') — returns only 2 nodes (login-continue-button, login-super-test-button) instead of expected ~10+. Fix: search-and-replace `data-testid=` to `testID=` across /app/frontend/app/**/*.tsx and /app/frontend/src/components/**/*.tsx for RN-rendered components.
